W06-Reflection Essay-Introduction to Positron

Author

Kevin Bachez

Published

June 15, 2026

1 Prompt 1: Based on what you learned from Step 1 and Step 3, what do you like about Positron compared with RStudio?

1.1 Prompt

Based on what you learned from Step 1 and Step 3, what do you like about Positron compared with RStudio?

1.2 Response

Based on Step 1 and Step 3, what I like about Positron compared with RStudio is the activity bar that is located on the left side. The activity bar makes it easy to access files and the Git integration. Another thing I liked about Positron is that it has integrated the search and commands palette which allows me to quickly find commands and settings.

2 Prompt 2: Describe the various ways you can use AI inside Positron.

2.1 Prompt 2

Describe the various ways you can use AI inside Positron.

2.2 Response

Some ways that I can use AI inside Positron are to assist me in explaining codes, generating codes, debugging errors that may pop up, and answer any programming questions that I may have. The AI inside Positron can also help create tables, plots, and reports.

3 Prompt 3: Which AI tools have you installed or set up? Which AI tools did you find beneficial for you?

3.1 Prompt

Which AI tools have you installed or set up? Which AI tools did you find beneficial for you?

3.2 Responde

As of right now, I have only explored the AI tools that are built in and are shown in the videos. The AI tool that I found the most beneficial was the Positron Assistant because it helps explain codes, identify any errors, and answers any questions that I may have.

3.2.1 GitHub Euducation Acceptance Screenshot

# Prompt 1: Based on what you learned from Step 1 and Step 3, what do you like about Positron compared with RStudio?

## Prompt
Based on what you learned from Step 1 and Step 3, what do you like about Positron compared with RStudio?

## Response
Based on Step 1 and Step 3, what I like about Positron compared with RStudio is the activity bar that is located on the left side. The activity bar makes it easy to access files and the Git integration. Another thing I liked about Positron is that it has integrated the search and commands palette which allows me to quickly find commands and settings.  

# Prompt 2: Describe the various ways you can use AI inside Positron.
## Prompt 2
Describe the various ways you can use AI inside Positron.

## Response
Some ways that I can use AI inside Positron are to assist me in explaining codes, generating codes, debugging errors that may pop up, and answer any programming questions that I may have. The AI inside Positron can also help create tables, plots, and reports.

# Prompt 3: Which AI tools have you installed or set up? Which AI tools did you find beneficial for you?

## Prompt
Which AI tools have you installed or set up? Which AI tools did you find beneficial for you?

## Responde
As of right now, I have only explored the AI tools that are built in and are shown in the videos. The AI tool that I found the most beneficial was the Positron Assistant because it helps explain codes, identify any errors, and answers any questions that I may have.
